examples: The whole world should remember the clever Chinese papermaker forever.
Indonesian papermaker Sinar Mas had entered India and was building a modern 100, 000-metric-ton-a-year factory for high-end coated paper.
The former papermaker, with headquarters in Jacksonville, owns 586, 000 acres, 90% of it developable and most within a few minutes of Florida Panhandle beachfront.
Mondi, a papermaker, trains staff to perform several different jobs, so that if one person falls ill, the paper mill need not stop rolling.
